title: aconitum volubile var. oligotrichum
intro: Aconitum volubile var. oligotrichum, also known as the Oligotrichum Aconitum or a variant of the Aconitum volubile, is a species of flowering plant in the Aconitum genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a pain reliever and anti-inflammatory agent, derived from its roots and leaves. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, fibromyalgia, and nerve pain, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or salves, although its use should be cautious and under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
